TypeSignature.Value: .class public interface auto ansi abstract beforefieldinit IValidationLocalizer

Docs.summary: Provides localization services for the validation pipeline. Implementations resolve display names (used as {0} placeholder substitutions in error messages) and localized error message text for instances. Set an instance on to enable localization.

remarks.para: The default implementation that integrates with Microsoft.Extensions.Localization.IStringLocalizer is provided by the Microsoft.Extensions.Validation.Localization package and is wired up by calling AddValidationLocalization(). Custom implementations can be supplied directly via .

Implementations may be invoked outside the validation pipeline (for example, during server-side rendering of client-side validation rules), so they must not depend on per-validation state and must be safe to call concurrently.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance string ResolveDisplayName([in]valuetype Microsoft.Extensions.Validation.DisplayNameLocalizationContext context) cil managed
Public Function ResolveDisplayName (context As DisplayNameLocalizationContext) As String

Docs.param: Information about the member to resolve a display name for.
Docs.summary: Resolves a localized display name for the member described by .
Docs.returns: The localized display name, or if not available.
Docs.remarks: Implementations should return to indicate that no localization is available; the validation pipeline falls back to . When is , implementations typically return as well.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance string ResolveErrorMessage([in]valuetype Microsoft.Extensions.Validation.ErrorMessageLocalizationContext context) cil managed
Public Function ResolveErrorMessage (context As ErrorMessageLocalizationContext) As String

Docs.param: Information about the validation attribute and the member it applied to.
Docs.summary: Resolves a fully-formatted localized error message for the validation attribute described by .
Docs.returns: The fully-formatted localized error message, or to use the attribute's default message.

remarks.para: Implementations should return when no localized message is available; the validation pipeline falls back to the attribute's default error message.
